q3: The model got the tone and structure right pretty quickly, but it took a few rounds to get the error message to actually diagnose the problem — the 'what happened / why / what to do' structure wasn't there from the start, I had to push for it. The CTA issue was the same thing: it defaulted to labeling the action rather than describing the outcome, which is a pretty fundamental thing to get right in product copy. Once I flagged it the model understood immediately, but it shouldn't have needed flagging.
